heroImage: https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/2/20/2023_Audi_RS6_Avant_in_Nardo_Grey_%28Front%29.jpg/1920px-2023 Audi RS6 Avant in Nardo Grey (Front).jpg
description: The Audi RS6, produced across four generations since 2002, is the definitive super estate. The C6 generation's 5.0-litre twin-turbo V10 producing 572 bhp in standard form remains legendary. The current C8 with its 4.0-litre twin-turbo V8 and up to 621 bhp in Performance trim continues the tradition.
